sink_impls.description: Generic implementation allowing any Sink to be borrowed mutably
Generic implementation for boxed Sink types
Convenience sink providing line numbers and UTF-8 string matches via closure
Convenience sink providing line numbers and lossily-converted UTF-8 matches via closure
Convenience sink providing line numbers and raw byte matches via closure
Test-only sink that formats all available information for assertion validation
Standard grep-like output printer supporting colors, replacements, and statistics
JSON Lines output printer for machine-readable results
Summary printer for aggregate results (total matches, file paths)

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search
call_chain.description: Entry point for search execution, branches based on file type/preprocessing needs

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search_path
call_chain.description: Searches a file path directly (enables memory mapping optimizations)

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search_reader
call_chain.description: Generic search implementation dispatching to search_path or search_reader fns

call_chain.name: search_path<M, W>
call_chain.description: Dispatch function: matches on Printer enum to get appropriate Sink

call_chain.name: search_reader<M, R, W>
call_chain.description: Dispatch function: matches on Printer enum to get appropriate Sink

call_chain.name: Printer enum
call_chain.description: Enum defining three printer variants; each exposes .sink_with_path() method

call_chain.name: Standard::sink_with_path
call_chain.description: Instantiates StandardSink with matcher and path, returns as &mut dyn Sink

call_chain.name: JSON::sink_with_path
call_chain.description: Instantiates JSONSink with matcher and path, returns as &mut dyn Sink

call_chain.name: Summary::sink_with_path
call_chain.description: Instantiates SummarySink with matcher and path, returns as &mut dyn Sink

call_chain.name: Searcher::search_path
call_chain.description: Public searcher API accepting generic Sink; dispatches to internal strategies

call_chain.name: Searcher::search_reader
call_chain.description: Public searcher API accepting generic Sink; dispatches to multiline or line-by-line

call_chain.name: ReadByLine::run | MultiLine::run
call_chain.description: Internal search strategies that call sink.matched(), .context(), .finish()

change_impact_map.change: CREATE: New printer file with MyPrinter struct, Builder, and MyFormatSink type
IMPLEMENT: impl Sink for MyFormatSink<'p, 's, M, W> with matched(), context(), finish()
ADD: mod myformat; behind feature gate if conditional
EXPORT: Add pub use crate::myformat::{MyPrinter, MyFormatSink, MyPrinterBuilder};
UPDATE: Add Printer::MyFormat match arm in Printer::get_mut()
UPDATE: Add Printer::MyFormat match arm in search_path() function
UPDATE: Add Printer::MyFormat match arm in search_reader() function
UPDATE: Add CLI flag parser for new format selection (e.g., --myformat)
UPDATE: Add instantiation of Printer::MyFormat(...) in builder based on flags
